concerns.analysis: The source document contains a logo for the 'STUDENT TRAINING EXPERIENCE PROGRAM STEP' at the top of the first page. While an element is present in the HTML output, the provided image manifest explicitly indicates that the base64 data for this image is corrupt or invalid ('valid': false with error 'No module named 'PIL''). According to the instructions, corrupt images that will not render properly must be flagged as a V2 FAIL.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Agency logo at the top of page 1 featuring a figure, stairs, and the word 'STEP'
concerns.output_quote: Image manifest reports 'valid': false for the image on page 1

concerns.analysis: The source document uses bolding and underlining to emphasize several list items. For instance, the second bullet point under 'APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS' is both bolded and underlined in the PDF, and the date bullets under 'Important Dates:' are bolded. The extraction JSON captures these merely as plain text, losing both the bolding markdown and the underline entirely.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Application deadline of 4/18/2022 5PM (or may remain open until we have suitable applicant pool) (Underlined and bolded in PDF)
concerns.output_quote: "Application deadline of 4/18/2022 5PM (or may remain open until we have suitable applicant pool)" (No markdown or underline indicators)

concerns.description: Displaced hyperlinks: 2 link(s) extracted as standalone elements instead of inline text
concerns.analysis: standalone_links=2, examples=['https://deq.nc.gov/', 'mailto:DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov']. Links should be inline within paragraphs, not separate blocks.

concerns.description: 1 bare URL(s) in text not converted to hyperlinks: DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov
concerns.analysis: bare_url_count=1. URLs appear as plain text instead of clickable links.

concerns.description: Source PDF contains 1 instance(s) of blue-styled text without hyperlink annotations. These appear to be intended as hyperlinks but were not annotated in the PDF (likely lost during Word-to-PDF export). This is a source document limitation, not a pipeline defect. Examples: page 3: "DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov"
concerns.analysis: orphaned_blue_text_count=1. Blue text without link annotations detected via PyMuPDF color extraction.
